description: Phase 9 CLI implementation for mealplan: add production calculation command, format handling, debug behavior, and canonical exit-code mapping.

userStories.title: Add production mealplan calculation command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want a single typed calculation command so I can run meal plan computation end-to-end from terminal inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or extend root `mealplan` CLI command path in `src/mealplan/cli/main.py` to run production calculation flow.
Canonical flags are explicitly supported: `--age`, `--gender`, `--height`, `--weight`, `--activity`, `--carbs`, `--training-tomorrow`, `--training-zones`, `--training-before`, `--format`, `--debug`.
CLI maps parsed args to MealPlanRequest payload or DTO expected by application layer.
Existing probe command remains available and unchanged in behavior.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement strict typed flag and option parsing
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want CLI options strongly typed so invalid values fail early with deterministic errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Typer option types and enum choices are explicitly enforced.
Required options fail with deterministic CLI validation messaging and validation-class error mapping.
Optional training fields are parsed without business-rule duplication in CLI.
Tests verify typed parsing failures for representative invalid inputs.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Parse training-zones as JSON string only
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want predictable training-zones input behavior so orchestration receives canonical structured data.
acceptanceCriteria: training-zones accepts JSON string input only via `--training-zones`.
Invalid JSON is rejected deterministically and mapped as validation-class failure to ExitCode.VALIDATION 2.
CLI does not support file-path or shorthand parsing forms in Phase 9.
Parsed zones structure is passed as request payload field without CLI business logic.
Tests verify valid JSON parsing and invalid-JSON rejection.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Wire CLI to MealPlanCalculationService
userStories.description: As an implementation owner, I want CLI handlers to call the application service directly so CLI remains a thin boundary adapter.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI instantiates or calls MealPlanCalculationService.calculate(...)
CLI does not directly invoke domain calculators or services.
Returned MealPlanResponse is used as the single source for output formatting.
Tests verify command path calls application service and returns deterministic output.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement format json text table
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want multiple output formats so I can use machine-readable output by default and human-readable output when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add format option with allowed values json, text, table.
Default output format is json.
JSON output stays stable and deterministic for automation use.
Text and table outputs are derived from MealPlanResponse without modifying core response values.
Text and table outputs include top-level fields TDEE, training_carbs_g, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g and all six canonical meals in canonical order.
Tests verify format selection behavior and default JSON output.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement debug error behavior
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want concise errors by default and deeper diagnostics when requested so troubleshooting is possible without noisy normal output.
acceptanceCriteria: Default error output is concise and user-facing in a single-line style on stderr.
With debug enabled, include traceback and details on stderr for the same error.
Successful command output remains on stdout.
Debug mode does not change successful command output semantics.
Tests verify default versus debug error-output differences.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Map exceptions to canonical exit codes
userStories.description: As an integration user, I want stable process exit codes so automation can handle failures deterministically.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI maps invalid typed flag parsing and invalid training-zones JSON to validation-class failures with ExitCode.VALIDATION 2.
CLI maps ValidationError to ExitCode.VALIDATION 2.
CLI maps DomainRuleError to ExitCode.DOMAIN 3.
CLI maps unknown runtime errors to ExitCode.RUNTIME 4.
Success path exits with ExitCode.OK 0.
Tests verify each mapped code via representative failure scenarios.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add CLI integration test matrix for valid and failure modes
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want CLI-level end-to-end coverage so regressions in command wiring, formatting, and exit behavior are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add representative success tests for default JSON output, explicit text format, and explicit table format.
Add representative failure tests for invalid typed flag value, invalid training-zones JSON, and propagated validation, domain, and runtime errors with exit code checks.
Add tests for debug traceback behavior on errors.
Canonical CLI test targets are `tests/cli/test_help.py`, `tests/cli/test_error_handling.py`, `tests/cli/test_probe.py`, plus dedicated calculation-command coverage in `tests/cli/test_calculate.py`.
Tests run through CLI command invocation path using Typer runner or subprocess, not direct service call.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Document Phase 9 CLI contract and usage
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want clear CLI docs for flags, formats, debug behavior, and exit codes so users and future phases rely on stable command behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with finalized CLI boundary responsibilities and error and format handling notes.
Update docs/REQUIREMENTS.md with CLI usage clarifications for format, debug, and strict JSON training-zones input.
Update README or usage docs with concrete command examples for json, text, and table outputs.
Document exit-code mapping and debug behavior expectations.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
